Table of Contents

NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

The function returns the value of time in seconds since 0 hours, 0 minutes, 0 seconds, January 1, 1970, Coordinated Universal Time. A copy of the time value may be saved to the area indicated by the pointer If is a NULL pointer, no value is stored. Upon successful completion, returns the value of time. Otherwise a value of is returned and the global variable is set to indicate the error.

ERRORS

The following error codes may be set in An argument address referenced invalid memory.

SEE ALSO

HISTORY

A function appeared in
